precedence.when: Any structural contradiction, failed schema invariant, multiplayer=true, missing player, duplicate occupancy, or no usable arena calibration.
A blocking unknown/hypothesis changes root legality, a candidate destination, terminal race result, or the identity/order of the best safe candidate.
At least one definite legal terminal candidate exists, all definite legal terminal candidates are adverse, and no conditional candidate can be safe.
A complete best candidate exists and all non-authoritative dependencies are single_source_supported; no hypothesis/unknown can change the recommendation.
A complete best candidate exists and every dependency affecting legality, result and ordering is authoritative and every critical visual field used is confirmed.

specialRules: Candidate-set completeness is established before no_safe_solution is evaluated.
Unknown progress indices do not block per-turn race direction; they set terminalFightState=unknown.
A user confirmation does not promote rule authority. Outputs that depend on single-source rules remain confirmation_required.
